reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the Hamilton performance associated with Jonathan Groff when he was 30 years old.
2. Determine who wrote the historical musical song connected to that performance and return the writer.
original_final_question: Jonathan Groff was 30 years old when he appeared in a historical musical written by whom? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which actor born in 1985 is the performer named in the Hamilton song evidence? Evidence: Jonathan Groff: Jonathan Drew Groff (born March 26, 1985) is an American actor and singer. -> Jonathan Groff

Node 2: Who wrote the Hamilton song sung by Jonathan Groff? Evidence: You'll Be Back: "You'll Be Back" is the seventh song from Act 1 of the musical "Hamilton", based on the life of Alexander Hamilton, which premiered on Broadway in 2015. Lin-Manuel Miranda wrote both the music and lyrics to the song. It is sung by Jonathan Groff in the show's original cast recording. -> Lin-Manuel Miranda
